sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114343" key="xolhmesi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χολημ-εσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114343.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vomiting of bile,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:214" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.214</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.692f</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χολεμεσία.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
